headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -66.3)
key_insights: Fears trending up 69% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 119 quotes and 94 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.

• At 53.3, frustration levels remain in the upper third of the typical range, staying consistently high after yesterday's peak.

• Fears improved significantly from yesterday's very low point, while optimism stays deeply negative with minimal change.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
